title: aglaia gigantea
intro: Aglaia gigantea, also known as the giant aglaia, is a species of tree in the family Meliaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Aglaia gigantea can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
